name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express Aurora, Colorado — ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple loca...
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical store locations across the United States, with an online lending platform. The company has maintained a multi-service model serving consumers who need quick access to cash and financial services outside traditional banking channels.

ACE offers a range of short-term financial products including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, and tax preparation services. Their online loans platform allows customers to apply without visiting a physical location. The company operates store locations in multiple states, though service availability varies by location and state regulations.

ACE differentiates itself through a hybrid brick-and-mortar and digital lending model, providing in-person service options alongside online convenience. They maintain customer service channels through phone and email, and their store locator tool helps customers find nearby locations. The company collects and makes transparent certain data practices, including California-specific privacy notices.

ACE Cash Express operates in the small-dollar lending space, which carries inherent trade-offs. While they provide accessible credit for consumers in financial emergencies, specific loan terms, APRs, and fee structures are not disclosed on the accessible portions of their website. The company's service availability is restricted by state regulations, as evidenced by messaging that certain loan types are unavailable in specific states. Website technical issues (404 errors on location pages) suggest potential operational or digital infrastructure challenges.
pros: Multiple loan product types available: installment loans, title loans, and online loans for flexibility
Hybrid service model with both physical store locations and online lending platform
Check cashing, bill payment, and money transfer services available at many locations
Customer service accessible via multiple channels (phone: 877-ACE-CASH and email)
Tax preparation services offered at select locations
Same-day or next-day funding advertised for emergency cash needs
Business services available for commercial customers
cons: Loan terms, APRs, and specific fees not disclosed on accessible website pages
Service availability heavily restricted by state regulations with limited transparency on which products work where
Website appears to have technical issues with broken location pages (404 errors on Denver location and tax services pages)
Limited details about approval requirements, credit checks, or eligibility criteria visible on site
Physical store closures due to external events (Hurricane Ida closure mentioned) may disrupt service
best_for: Consumers needing emergency cash quickly with collateral (title loans)
Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing check cashing or bill payment services
Those seeking small installment loans without traditional bank requirements
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers in immediate financial emergencies who have collateral or can qualify for installment-based lending and prefer accessibility through physical locations or online platforms. The main caveat is that specific loan terms and APRs are not transparent on the website, state availability is highly variable, and borrowers should carefully review all fees before committing, as small-dollar loans in this category typically carry higher costs than traditional bank loans.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
